calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deborah Ann Milligan, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Jacqueline Romano, daughter to Petitioner (via Zoom).

The Court acknowledged the submitted papers and found them to be complete and thorough. The Court and Ms. Mulligan discussed her family history, including her grandfather's connection to Just Fish Grotto in San Francisco.

After discussions, the court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
